Version 1.0
Training tools and session support built for Behavior Technicians

"ABA Pro Coach was built to give Behavior Technicians fast, practical tools right at their fingertips — whether they're prepping for the RBT exam, running a session, or just need a quick definition between trials."

— The ABA Pro Coach Team
What's Inside
📚
Flashcards
70 cards across 7 core ABA topics
🧠
Quiz Mode
70 scenario-based questions with explanations
🎯
Session Helper
Visual stimulus library for real ABA trials
📖
Glossary
110+ searchable ABA terms with examples
Designed For
🌱
New Behavior Technicians
Fast onboarding, term lookup, and RBT exam prep all in one place
📋
RBTs Preparing for Certification
Practice the 7 domains covered on the RBT competency exam
🏢
ABA Organizations
Standardize training across your BT team with consistent content
Content & Compliance
✅
BACB-Aligned Content
All training content is aligned with the BACB RBT Task List (2nd Edition)
🔬
Evidence-Based
Definitions and examples are grounded in the science of Applied Behavior Analysis
🔒
Private & Secure
Your account data is stored securely. We never share your information.

Daily Study Reminder
Get a nudge each day to keep your study streak going.
Streak Reminders
Alert when you're about to lose your study streak.
Quiz Results Badge
Show a badge when you finish a quiz with your score.

Session Helper Tips
Quick tips and prompts during active trial sessions.
